problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Combining Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
